_comment: slidey-edit PoC deck — a tiny, deterministic 3-scene 'Spatial Annotation' explainer rendered through slidey. Scene types (title / cards / narrative) all emit semantic elements (see slidey src/semantic.js), so the .semantic.json sidecar carries real refs + bboxes the annotation overlay seeds from.

scenes.title: Spatial Annotation
scenes.subtitle: Point at the deck, not the prose
scenes.narration: Annotation now works on any rendered artifact — png, mp4, rrweb, html, and slidey decks.

scenes.title: One anchor union
scenes.narration: A single annotation anchor union ties operator feedback to an exact place in the artifact.

cards.label: semantic_element
cards.sub: a named element in the deck

cards.label: region
cards.sub: a drawn box on the frame

scenes.body: The anchored note flows into a refine pass that edits the exact scene element it points at.
scenes.narration: The anchored note flows into a refine pass that edits the exact scene element it points at.
